LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF SHARON SETO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION LACKS NECESSARY PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE AS TO SERVICE OF NOTICE OR EVENTS ALLEGED TO CONSTITUTE NUISANCE. IN ANY EVENT, DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION RAISES TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO CONDUCT AND WHETHER IT CONSTITUTED NUISANCE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF SHARON SETO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Plaintiff's declaration lacks necessary personal knowledge as to service of notice or events alleged to constitute nuisance. In any event, defendant's declaration raises triable issue of material fact as to conduct and whether it constituted nuisance. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
